title: The Love That Remains
description:
När kärleken bleknar, består minnena. Sverrir Gudnason spelar en far som befinner sig mellan skratt och sorg - där minnena är de enda som håller allt samman.

The Love That Remains fångar ömsint ett år i en familjs liv. Ett år där föräldrarna försöker navigera genom sin separation långsamt, men oundvikligen glider isär. Med en blandning av lekfullhet och djup porträtterar filmen det bitterljuva i en kärlek som bleknat, men där minnena fortfarande binder samman - allt mot en fond av årstidernas tysta förändring.

Hlynur Pálmason, regissören av Godland och En vit, vit dag, skildrar nu kärlekens och separationens komplexa sidor i The Love That Remains

NOTE! The screening on June 3 is with English subtitles. 

The film tenderly captures a year in the life of a family as the parents navigate their separation. Through both playful and heartfelt moments, the film portrays the bittersweet essence of faded love and shared memories amidst the changing seasons.

title: All That's Left Of You
description: After a Palestinian teen confronts Israeli soldiers at a West Bank protest, his mother recounts the series of events that led him to that fateful moment, starting with his grandfather's forced displacement.

tmdb.title: All That's Left of You
tmdb.overview: In the Occupied West Bank in Palestine of the 1980s, a Palestinian teenager is swept into a protest that changes the course of his family's life. Reeling from its aftermath, his mother, Hanan, shares the story that led them to that fateful moment. Spanning seven decades, this epic drama traces the hopes and heartaches of one uprooted family, revealing not only the scars of ethnic cleansing, but the unbreakable spirit of survival.
